sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75856" key="ou)lo/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐλό-πους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n75856.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">οὐλοκάρηνος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
